queries.question: What are the benefits with each job type?
queries.sql:
SELECT T.typeName, J.Benefits
FROM JobTypes AS T
LEFT JOIN Jobs AS J ON T.id = J.jobTypeId
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?typename ?benefits WHERE {
  ?t a :Job_Type .
  ?j a :Jobs .
  ?j p:hasJobTypes ?t .
  ?t p:typeName ?typename .
  ?j p:Benefits ?benefits .
}

queries.question: show me the location, base pay range and benefits for all jobs
queries.sql:
SELECT L.locationName, J.Base_Pay_Range, Benefits
FROM Locations AS L
LEFT JOIN Jobs AS J ON L.id = J.locationId
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?locationname ?base_pay_range ?benefits WHERE {
  ?l a :Locations .
  ?j a :Jobs .
  ?j p:hasLocations ?l .
  ?l p:locationName ?locationname .
  ?j p:Base_Pay_Range ?base_pay_range .
  ?j p:Benefits ?benefits .
}
